# @swqt/ui

> AI / agent quick index. Prefer AGENTS.md for rules.

## Package

- Name: `@swqt/ui`
- Peers: React 19, Radix family, lucide, CVA, … (see package.json)
- Tokens: require `@swqt/ui-tokens/tokens.css` in the app

## Must read

- AGENTS.md
- docs/DESIGN-SUMMARY.md
- docs/COMPONENT-CATALOG.md
- docs/DO-AND-DONT.md
- docs/ADOPTION.md

## Theme

- ThemeProvider resolves system, light, and dark preferences globally
- ThemeControl renders the standard global preference menu

## Includes

- Primitives (Button, forms, tables, overlays, …)
- WideScreenGate / WideScreenPlaceholder

## Not in this package

- AppShell / TopBar / product route IA
- Runtime API clients / business features
- Components showcase host app
- Separate ui-shell package (folded here)

## Sibling

- `@swqt/ui-tokens` — CSS tokens
